title: Mesadenella pumila
taxonomy: Mesadenella pumila is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. It is further classified within the subfamily Vanilloideae and the tribe Vanilleae. The genus Mesadenella is a small group of orchids that are native to Central and South America. Mesadenella pumila is one of the species within this genus, which is characterized by its small size and unique floral structure. This classification helps to organize and understand the relationships between different species within the orchid family.

parts: Mesadenella pumila is a species of cactus that has been used in traditional medicine, specifically in the treatment of various ailments.
